# Skialith

> Durability layer for AI agents. NATS JetStream write-ahead log + batched TiDB/MySQL persistence. Free to self-host under BUSL 1.1.

Skialith is an open-source infrastructure library that makes AI agents crash-recoverable. Every event an agent produces is acknowledged by NATS JetStream (~133µs p50) before being batched to a database — 7× faster than checkpointing directly to PostgreSQL or MySQL. If the agent crashes, it resumes from the last checkpoint rather than restarting from scratch.

## Key facts
- Per-event write latency: 133µs p50 (NATS PubAck), vs ~986µs for a synchronous MySQL INSERT
- Community Edition: free, self-hosted, 1,000 events/sec (backpressure, not rejection)
- Language support: Python SDK, TypeScript SDK, LangGraph drop-in checkpointer
- License: BUSL 1.1 — free for self-hosting in own VPC; managed service offering requires commercial license
- Contact: hello@skialith.io

## Links
- GitHub: https://github.com/leanerrk-star/skialith
- Website: https://skialith-protocol.org
- Protocol spec: https://skialith-protocol.org
